should_trigger: Design the retry behavior for an orchestrator step that charges a customer through an external API after queue redelivery and worker crashes.
Review this webhook consumer: it may receive duplicate delivery events and currently creates a new ticket every time.
Our agent runner resumes from checkpoints and may rerun the finalization step. How should we prevent duplicate completion emails and duplicate billing writes?
We claim exactly-once processing for queued tool calls. Check whether idempotency keys and receiver-side dedupe are enough.
Create a dedupe contract for at-least-once message processing where duplicate messages must return the original result.
should_not_trigger: Summarize the mathematical definition of an idempotent function for a beginner.
Optimize a stateless read-only cache lookup that has no side effects and can be repeated freely.
Choose colors and layout for an orchestration dashboard.
edge_cases: A retry uses a new attempt id for observability but should collapse to the same business operation. Decide which fields belong in the idempotency key.
The downstream payment provider timed out and does not support idempotency keys. Design the safest retry and reconciliation path.
